claim_bullets.bullet_text: Mutating existing objects when two bindings refer to the same value causes both to observe changes. (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.141-157)
Alias creation is demonstrated by assigning one array to another name and then mutating through either reference. (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.141-157)
Illustrative code snippets and images are provided to help visualize mutation behavior (possible, suggest). (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.141-157)

source_record_text: Summary of the mutation chapter in JavaScript Allongé, covering aliasing, mutating objects, linked lists, reassignment, and variable declaration differences.
